metadata.research_alignment: Culinary arts, baking science, cake decorating techniques, flavor profiles and combinations, global cake traditions, food chemistry (Maillard reaction, emulsification, crystallization), molecular gastronomy, modern food culture and social media trends

coverage_details.regular_clues: Traditional cake flavors (vanilla, chocolate), international cake styles (tres leches, Black Forest, Victoria sponge), baking equipment and tools, decorating techniques, chemistry of baking reactions, fondant and frosting science, ingredient functions, classic cake traditions
coverage_details.cah_clues: Modern baking culture, social media cake trends, homemade vs store-bought comparisons, baker failures and disasters, expensive specialty ingredients, TikTok culture, Instagram-worthy cakes, millennial baking stereotypes, budget cake hacks, relationship humor around baking expectations

metadata.style_notes: CAH clues follow the style guide: short, punchy setups with unexpected payoffs, mainstream cultural references (Instagram, TikTok, Hostess snacks), relatable humor about baking failures and social expectations, dark comedy about food culture and effort vs. reality, avoiding obscure references and academic jargon
